item.title: Kanu signs a 1 day contract with the Windsor Spitfires!
item.description: 4 decades after he was to try out for the OHL team, but was derailed by an injury, he signs a 1 day contract. He used the time to sign autographs on various items to be auctioned off to raise funds for the Canadian Mental Health Association.
item.dc:creator: blackmomba

item.title: Good Guy Keanu Reeves signs 1-day contract with OHL team to help raise money for mental health
item.description: Movie star Keanu Reeves signed a one-day contract with the Ontario Hockey League's Windsor Spitfires on Thursday. It was to support the Canadian Mental Health Association's Windsor-Essex branch, which will auction off signed items from the actor and all proceeds going to the organization. Reeves was in the Ontario border city to play bass for his longtime American alternative rock band Dogstar at Windsor's casino Thursday. Reeves grew up in Toronto and was born in Beirut. According to NHL.com, the Matrix star was a goaltender and came close to trying out for the Spitfires when he was a teenager, but couldn't because of injury. After that, he went into acting full time. The story is legendary here in Windsor, says Bill Bowler, general manager of the Windsor Spitfires, so when they learned Reeves was coming to town, an employee of the organization reached out to see what could happen. "We thought it would be cute. We thought by getting him to sign a jersey, we're going to auction it off for the CMHA (Canadian Mental Health Association), and hopefully raise some money for a great cause," Bowler said. "And again, we can't thank Mr. Reeves enough." More people need to be like Keanu. Truly a genuine individual. #GoodGuyKeanuReeves
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: Can relate... This is very moving
item.description: My Hira ( now in doggy heaven ) started having issues with his eyes in his elder years and lost most of his sight eventually despite eye surgery and treatment. Watching these two I can relate ...how special this moment must be!
item.dc:creator: wheyandcoffee

item.title: I laughed way too hard at this 'mindblown' rant! Lmfao
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: My Wolverine Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— sharing my latest cosplay! It was meant to be simple, but I put about 28 hours into it and I’m really proud of it. I ordered this suit “custom-made,” except it wasn’t, at all. So I had to “tailor” the vest completely (I can’t sew, so it’s all hot glue and staples). The claws are plastic, ordered off Amazon but then chopped up to fit my hands better and assembled into custom-painted gloves, where I also patterned and made the little “ports” for them in silver EVA foam. Then I made the helmet from EVA foam and I weathered the whole suit with acrylic paint!
I’ve been obsessed with Wolverine for years (there’s me at age 13 with my plushie, it’s a miracle I didn’t have forks between my knuckles) so it’s really cool to finally cosplay him in an outfit I LOVE.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: It appears that if cops break down your door using a bad warrant and kill you, it's your fault
item.description: A Federal judge ruled that Breonna Taylor's boyfriend is the cause of her death. He opened fire on what he thought was someone breaking into the apartment, but was actually police. The police returned fire, killing Breonna Taylor. The police had made a false statement to a judge to obtain this warrant, they only had basic rumors and no solid evidence. They knew that what they had would not get them the warrant, so they lied to the judge to get him to sign a no knock search warrant. I'm not a lawyer, but this feels wrong on every level. Front page edit: Don't forget about this and write your local and federal officials about what you think of this!
item.dc:creator: qhogan11337

I’m so tired - figured I’d drop this before bed because I love you beautiful people.
Tim curry in clue is underrated
Oooof
I’m trying to gain weight and I ate a whole dang family size Shepards pie and 2 steaks this week- and lost 5 more lbs wth
Hopefully you got a laugh or two- goodnight my beautiful internet family

item.title: Screwed out of 57 years of pay, forced to work in the docks. Support unions.
item.dc:creator: YvesStRollerblade

item.title: Why is this happening?
item.description:
I just don't know what to do. I'm just so sad and angry. A lot of you might exprienced something similar and maybe you know how I feel right now. I just left my hometown last week, I was there to get some stuff, to bring to our house we just moved into this year. I've lived there my whole life (I'm 32) and I love my hometown, even though I know it's flawed, but this year has been especially bad. There were three stages, at three different locations at the inner city. My family was there celebrating and thankfully they were at a different stage. I'm so relieved they were not harmed. We were at the same location last week, having dinner with my parents and now people were killed there, I just cannot believe it. My heart hurts and I balled my eyes out already, because I can't understand how anybody could to something like that. Taking another persons life... They cancelled the whole weekend celebration and are planning to hold a memorial service for the victims. Last week, when I was there, I was kind of torn. Like I said, I've lived there my entire life. I know how to get around there and I walked around at night and I was never scared. Now I am actually glad that I moved. Now I live in a villiage 4 hours away. Nothing every happens here, it's exremely quiet and I feel like I live in Pleasent Ville, but I take this over whatever happens over there. The first bad news I heard about this year was that someone blew himself up there, the second was an arson attack , in which a Bulgarian family died (including an infant) and now this. Can anybody tell my why this is happening? Not specifically these instances, but why is our world so hateful and violent? I am so sick of it. I'm an empathetic person and not only does this affect me, but all the news about war, or school shootings and all that kind of news usually keep my up all night. I'm sorry, I just needed to vent and scream this into the imgur void. Here are some nice pictures of my hometown.
This is the "Müngstener Brücke" , it's germany's tallest train bridge. There is a park around it and it's beautiful.
"Schloss Burg" was build in the 12th century. It's on top of a hill. You can either walk up a very steep trail or take the cable car. In the complex is a museum and you can go to the top of the tower.
"Deutsche Klingenmuseum / German Blade museum". My hometown ist famous for its knives and other cutlery. It's worth a visit. There are many other beautiful spots and I need to remember that. Not everything is going down the drain, I guess... Thank you, if you read this Edit: Thank you so much for your kind words! Reading your comments really helped me through the day. I am still devasted and incedibly sad about what happened . We should stand together in times like this, but some right wind idiots are already using this event to stoke up hatred. Solingen has always been a multicultural city and we should not let them devide us ! Thank you guys so much again! I love you, imgur strangers <3
item.dc:creator: Mythania

item.title: Mozart's kitchen at No. 9 Getreidegasse in Salzburg, Austria. The Mozart family resided on the third floor of the townhouse from 1747 to 1773, and Mozart himself was born there on 27 January 1756.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: It's My Cake Day!
item.description: This is one of first ever posts from like 8 years ago. This was before we could post videos. What a mess, random white borders and no black outline on the captions. Of course the joke is Moss had only met this woman an hour before and now they're behaving like they've been married 20 years.
